name: akshara

metadata.name: akshara
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: GNU General Public License (GPL)
metadata.summary: A project to help spelling in Sanskrit (Devanaagari)

documentation:
# Akshara

### Helps you spell!

![Linting Tests](https://github.com/arindamsaha1507/akshara/actions/workflows/pylint.yml/badge.svg)
![Code Tests](https://github.com/arindamsaha1507/akshara/actions/workflows/pytest.yml/badge.svg)
![GitHub commit activity](https://img.shields.io/github/commit-activity/w/arindamsaha1507/akshara)
![GitHub last commit](https://img.shields.io/github/last-commit/arindamsaha1507/akshara)

Akshara is a tool for all your spelling needs. The package offers functions to:

1. Spell any given word (or any string) in Devanagari script.
2. Construct a word from a given spelling.
3. Count the number of svaras in a string.
4. Count the number of sentences in a string.
5. Obtain the syllables of a word.

# Installation

Latest version of akshara can be directly installed from PyPI using

```bash
pip3 install akshara
```

# Usage

## Load the varnakaarya module

```python
import akshara.varnakaarya as vk
```

## Obtain spelling (vinyaasa) of a word

```python
a = vk.get_vinyaasa("राम")       # a = ['र्', 'आ', 'म्', 'अ']
b = vk.get_vinyaasa("गमॢँ")       # b = ['ग्', 'अ', 'म्', 'ऌँ']
c = vk.get_vinyaasa("स पठति ।")  # c = ['स्', 'अ', ' ', 'प्', 'अ', 'ठ्', 'अ', 'त्', 'इ', ' ', '।']
```

## Obtain syllables (akshara) of a word

```python
a = vk.get_akshara("राम")       # a = ['रा', 'म']
b = vk.get_akshara("गमॢँ")       # b = ['ग', 'मॢँ']
c = vk.get_akshara("पठति")      # c = ['प', 'ठ', 'ति']
```

## Create a word (shabda) from a given vinyaasa

```python
d = vk.get_shabda(['स्', 'अ', 'ं', 'स्', 'क्', 'ऋ', 'त्' ,'अ', 'म्'])    # d = 'संस्कृतम्'
e = vk.get_shabda(['श्', 'इ', 'व्', 'अ', 'ः'])                        # e = 'शिवः'
f = vk.get_shabda(['द्', 'ए', 'व्', 'अ', 'द्', 'अ', 'त्', 'त्', 'अ३'])  # f = देवदत्त३
```

## Count svaras, vyanjanas, ayogavaahas and vaakyas

```python
g = "बुद्धं शरणं गच्छामि । धर्मं शरणं गच्छामि । सङ्घं शरणं गच्छामि ॥"

num_svaras = vk.count_svaras(g)            # num_svaras = 24
num_vyanjanas = vk.count_vyanjanas(g)      # num_vyanjanas = 30
num_ayogavaahas = vk.count_ayogavaahas(g)  # num_ayogavaahas = 6
num_varnas = vk.count_varnas(g)            # num_varnas = 60
num_vaakyas = vk.count_vaakyas(g)          # num_vaakyas = 3
```

modules.name: akshara.varna_compiler
documentation: Contructs a list of varnas with all properties

functions.name: akshara.varna_compiler.write_csv
documentation:
Writes properties of a single varna to a csv file

Args:
    parts (list): List of components to be written
    filename (str): Filename of the output file

functions.name: akshara.varna_compiler.create_moola
documentation:
Creates moola varna table

Args:
    data_dict (dict): Data dictionary containing all information
    moola_fname (str): Output filename

functions.name: akshara.varna_compiler.handle_anunaasika
documentation:
Modifies data according to anunaasika

Args:
    data (dict): Original data

Returns:
    dict: Modified data

functions.name: akshara.varna_compiler.get_svara_chinha
documentation:
Returns svarachinha according to svarabheda

Args:
    svara_bheda (str): Svarabheda

Returns:
    str: Svarachinha

functions.name: akshara.varna_compiler.create_vistrita
documentation:
Creates vistrita varna table

Args:
    data_dict (dict): Data dictionary containing all information
    moola_fname (str): Output filename

functions.name: akshara.varna_compiler.create_varna_table
documentation:
Creates varna tables

Args:
    input (str, optional): Input file for varnas (yaml). Defaults to "resources/varna.yml".
    moola (str, optional): Output file for moola. Defaults to "resources/moola.csv".
    laukika (str, optional): Output file for laukika. Defaults to "resources/laukika.csv".
    vistrita (str, optional): Output file for vistrita. Defaults to "resources/vistrita.csv".
    latest (str, optional): Output file for latest. Defaults to "resources/latest.csv".

modules.name: akshara.varnakaarya
documentation: Handles all operations on varnas

functions.name: akshara.varnakaarya.check_vinyaasa
documentation:
Checks is a vinyaasaa contains illegal characters

Args:
    vinyaasa (list): Vinyaasa to be analysed

functions.name: akshara.varnakaarya.maarjaka
documentation:
Cleans up a string

Args:
    sentence (str): String to be cleaned

Returns:
    str: Clean string

functions.name: akshara.varnakaarya.count_svaras
documentation:
Counts the number of svaras

Args:
    vinyaasa (list): Vinyaasa of a string

Returns:
    int: Number of svaras

functions.name: akshara.varnakaarya.count_vyanjanas
documentation:
Counts the number of vyanjanas

Args:
    vinyaasa (list | str): Vinyaasa of a string

Returns:
    int: Number of vyanjanas

functions.name: akshara.varnakaarya.count_ayogavaahas
documentation:
Counts the number of ayogavaahas

Args:
    vinyaasa (list | str): Vinyaasa of a string

Returns:
    int: Number of ayogavaahas

functions.name: akshara.varnakaarya.count_varnas
documentation:
Counts the number of varnas

Args:
    vinyaasa (list | str): Vinyaasa of a string

Returns:
    int: Number of varnas

functions.name: akshara.varnakaarya.count_vaakyas
documentation:
Counts the number of vaakyas

Args:
    vinyaasa (list): Vinyaasa of a string

Returns:
    int: Number of vaakyas

functions.name: akshara.varnakaarya.break_paada
documentation:
Breaks a line into two equal paadas

Args:
    vinyaasa (list): Vinyaasa of the string to be broken

Returns:
    list: List containing two resultant vinyaasas

functions.name: akshara.varnakaarya.add_akaara
documentation:
Decides on the type of akaara (anunaasika or not) to be added in the vinyaasa and adds it

Args:
    shabda (str): String in consideration
    index (int): Location in the string which is being considered
    vinyaasa (list): Current state of the vinyaasa

Returns:
    list: Updated vinyaasa

functions.name: akshara.varnakaarya.combine_pluta
documentation:
Combines all pluta markings with their svaras

Args:
    vinyaasa (list): Vinyaasa in consideration

Returns:
    list: Modified vinyaasa

functions.name: akshara.varnakaarya.split_pluta
documentation:
Splits all pluta markings

Args:
    vinyaasa (list): Vinyaasa in consideration

Returns:
    list: Modified vinyaasa

functions.name: akshara.varnakaarya.get_vinyaasa
documentation:
Returns the vinyaasa (spelling) of a string

Args:
    shabda (str): String to be spelled

Returns:
    str: Spelling of the string

functions.name: akshara.varnakaarya.get_shabda
documentation:
Reconstructs a string from a vinyaasa (spelling)

Args:
    vinyaasa (list): Spelling of the string

Returns:
    str: Reconstructed string

functions.name: akshara.varnakaarya.get_sankhyaa
documentation:
Converts romal numerals to devanaagari

Args:
    s (str): Roman number in string form

Returns:
    str: Devanaagari number in string form

functions.name: akshara.varnakaarya.get_akshara
documentation:
Returns the akshara (syllable) of a string

Args:
    vinyaasa (list): Vinyaasa of the string

Returns:
    list: Syllables of the string

Read varna table

Args:

    directory (str, optional): Resource directory. Defaults to 'resources'.

Returns:
